\tzpentry{ID4282}{Chemical Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4282 introduces Chemical Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$W_p(\mu, \nu) = (\inf \int d(x,y)^p d\gamma(x,y))^{1/p}$
\]
